title: Faction War
intro: Faction War is a simple server-wide competition between two factions. Choose a side, contribute to help it grow, and earn powerful rewards as your faction levels up.

figure.alt: Faction War panel showing both factions and the Faction Leader buff
figure.caption: The Faction War panel — current standings, your contribution, and the leading faction's passive buff.

cells: The faction of light — join to fight under Einhasad's banner.
The faction of darkness — join to serve under Shilen's power.

infoBoxes.label: Keep the Balance
infoBoxes.body: Only the **leading faction** receives the buff. Join the faction with fewer members to help keep competition fair.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
steps: Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) and select **Faction War**.
Click **Join Einhasad** or **Join Shilen** to pick your faction.
Contribute **Gold Bars** using the *Contribute EXP* button to increase your faction's experience.
As the faction's level rises, members receive **new items and rewards**.
The faction in the lead earns the **Faction Leader** passive buff for all its members.

figure.alt: Faction Leader Lv 1 passive skill tooltip
figure.caption: Faction Leader Lv 1 — passive buff granted to all members of the leading faction.

cells: Spend Gold Bars to add EXP to your faction's total.
See the items unlocked at each faction level.
Check top contributors across both factions.
